single_area: The image shows one filled area chart with labeled x-axis positions and numeric values shown at the points.
The figure shows one filled area chart with labeled x-axis positions and numeric values shown at the points.
The visual shows one filled area chart with labeled x-axis positions and numeric values shown at the points.
The image contains one filled area chart with labeled x-axis positions and numeric values shown at the points.
The chart presents one filled area chart with labeled x-axis positions and numeric values shown at the points.
stacked_area: The image shows one stacked area chart with colored category bands, numeric band values, and a legend.
The figure shows one stacked area chart with colored category bands, numeric band values, and a legend.
The visual shows one stacked area chart with colored category bands, numeric band values, and a legend.
The image contains one stacked area chart with colored category bands, numeric band values, and a legend.
The chart presents one stacked area chart with colored category bands, numeric band values, and a legend.

interval_area_value: Using displayed x-axis order from {start_label} through {end_label}, compute the area under the filled curve by summing (left value + right value) / 2 for each adjacent pair.
From {start_label} through {end_label}, use each neighboring pair of point values in order; add (left + right) / 2 for every pair to get the total area.
Compute the area under the area chart from {start_label} to {end_label}: for each adjacent x-axis pair, average the two point values, then sum those averages.
What is the total area under the filled curve over {start_label} through {end_label}? Use unit width, so each adjacent pair contributes (left value + right value) / 2.
Use the point values from {start_label} through {end_label} in displayed order; sum (neighboring value pair total) / 2 across the interval.
stacked_band_interval_sum_value: For category {category_label}, what is the sum of its band values from {start_label} through {end_label}, inclusive, in displayed x-axis order?
Add the band values for {category_label} across displayed x-axis labels {start_label} through {end_label}; what is the total?
Using the legend to find {category_label}, compute its total band value from {start_label} to {end_label} in displayed x-axis order.
What is the inclusive displayed-interval sum for category {category_label} between {start_label} and {end_label}?
Find category {category_label} in the stacked area chart and sum its shown band values from {start_label} through {end_label} in displayed x-axis order.
stacked_band_dominance_label: From {start_label} through {end_label} in displayed x-axis order, which category has the largest total band value?
Across the displayed interval {start_label} through {end_label}, identify the category with the greatest sum of shown band values.
Which legend category contributes the highest total from {start_label} to {end_label} in displayed x-axis order?
Sum each category's band values over {start_label} through {end_label} in displayed x-axis order; which category is largest?
Over the inclusive displayed x-axis interval {start_label} to {end_label}, which category has the dominant total?

Answer format: {answer_hint}.

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.

Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.

query:interval_area_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested area as an integer
query:interval_area_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of the data point markers from the first queried x-axis label through the second queried x-axis label

query:stacked_band_interval_sum_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested band-value sum as an integer
query:stacked_band_interval_sum_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of the queried category's band-value points from the first queried x-axis label through the second queried x-axis label

query:stacked_band_dominance_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact category label as a string
query:stacked_band_dominance_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of the answer category's band-value points in the queried x-axis interval
